title: List workspaces return an empty list
excerpt:
We noticed that once our app is being installed to a limited set of workspaces, a graphql query that lists the workspaces return always an empty list. 
It happens even if we specify the ids of specific workspaces that ac…

posts.author: omkoren (Omer Koren)
posts.cookedHtml:
We noticed that once our app is being installed to a limited set of workspaces, a graphql query that lists the workspaces return always an empty list.
It happens even if we specify the ids of specific workspaces that access was granted to.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @omkoren and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form so our team can take a look into this? Please add as much detail about your case as possible. A screen recording of the steps you are taking and the result would be fantastic!

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias
